channel.title: Radiochimica Acta
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Radiochimica Acta

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-frontmatter12

item.title: The collaboratively selective uranyl adsorption of marine fungal modification biosorbent linked by the open-chain polyether terminal with amidoxime
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0296

item.title: Assessment of certain theoretical modeling for extraction data of uranium ion by loaded SM-7 with TBP using fixed bed column operation
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0293

item.title: Study on separation of ReO4−, a substitute for TcO4−, using functional ionic liquid impregnated extraction chromatography resins
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0290

item.title: Synergistic extraction of some divalent cations into nitrobenzene by using dicarbollylcobaltate and substituted calix[5]arenes
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0305

item.title: Development of gelatin nanoparticles for positron emission tomography diagnosis in pancreatic cancer
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0304

item.title: Radiochemical separation of 161 Tb from neutron irradiated Gd target by liquid-liquid extraction technique
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0286

item.title: Influence of gamma irradiation on germination traits, growth and biochemical attributes of dragon fruit (Selenicereus monacanthus)
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0294

item.title: Thermoluminescence response of Ce doped CaTiO3 nanophosphor synthesized by hydrothermal method for gamma dosimetry
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0282

item.title: Significant influence of La2O3 content on radiation shielding characteristics properties of bismuth sodium borosilicate glasses
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0307

item.title: The effect of rare earths (Nd3+, Er3+, Yb3+) additives on the radiation shielding properties of the tungsten oxide modified tellurite glasses
item.description: Article by Ömer Kaban, Gülçin Bilgici Cengiz, İlyas Çağlar, Gökhan Bilir DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0297
